task.raw: Add a local OCR/data pipeline smoke that rejects outputs missing searchable PDF text layer evidence. It must run on a Hungarian old-doc fixture, generate a manifest, searchable text, and search index artifacts, handle a missing-text-layer invalid fixture, and record that no external OCR API cost or live approval is used.

fixture.name: synthetic-hungarian-ocr-pipeline
notes: The replay writes a local package with a real pipeline CLI and fixture files.
The accepted run executes the pipeline CLI, invalid-input assertion, and data surface artifact assertions.
The weak-artifact run writes files that exist but lack searchable text-layer content and must reject.
